page_metadata.biotools__summary: Haplotype phasing for large-scale population genotypes data. Significantly improved version of the WinHAP program that both process longer sequences with less computer memory usage and increases computing speed.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Haplotype phasing for large-scale population genotypes data. Significantly improved version of the WinHAP program that both process longer sequences with less computer memory usage and increases computing speed.
